1: Hold not thy peace, and be not still, O God.
2: And they that hate thee have lifted up the head.
3: And consulted against thy hidden ones.
4: That the name of Israel may be no more in remembrance.
7: The Philistines with the inhabitants of Tyre;
8: They have holpen the children of Lot. Selah. Selah.
9: As to to Sisera, as to to Jabin, at the brook of Kison:
10: They became as as dung for the earth.
11: Yea, all their princes as Zebah, and as Zalmunna:
12: The houses of God in possession.
13: As the stubble before the wind.
14: And as the flame setteth the mountains on fire;
15: And make them afraid with thy storm.
16: That they may seek thy name, O LORD LORD .
17: Yea, let them be put to shame, and perish:
18: Art Art the Most High over all the earth.
